message:
test(db,server): add 42 tests for integrity, retention, tool_metrics, static_export

integrity.rs: populated DB checks, multiple tables, serde fields,
check_due timing, clone preservation, debug formatting.

retention.rs: whitespace patterns, nested dir_size, multi-agent inbox
counting, ignored projects, inbox quota, multiple projects scan.

tool_metrics.rs: i64_from_u64_saturating boundaries, schema idempotency,
empty snapshot persist, pruning old rows, memory DB fallbacks, limit.

static_export.rs: control chars, all special chars, multibyte truncation,
SHA-256 known vectors, empty content hash, manifest serialization,
nested dir creation, write helpers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
